ABOUT

Backend engineer in my final year at NIT Kurukshetra (GPA 8.71). Building financial infrastructure at Osfin.ai that reconciles 65,000 ATMs daily without blinking.

I think in distributed systems — resilient, observable, event-driven. When the terminal closes, you'll find me on rollerskates or leaving watercolor stains on paper.

8.71
GPA · NITK
BEYOND CODE

The human
behind the terminal

Engineering is about creating systems. So is art. Creative habits keep the technical mind honest.

Rollerblade

Full presence and physical intuition — the same things as debugging a distributed trace at 2am.

Flow stateKinetic focusPrecision

Watercolor

The least forgiving medium — you can't undo a stroke. It trains you to plan ahead and embrace imperfection.

LayeringControlled chaosPatience

“Creativity is just systems thinking with fewer constraints.”

— RAJAN KAMBOJ
